title: Customers Who Never Order
input_format: Table: Customers with columns id (int), name (varchar). Table: Orders with columns id (int), customerId (int).
output_format: Result table with column Customers containing names of customers who never placed an order
example_input:
Table: Customers
| id | name  |
| 1  | Joe   |
| 2  | Henry |
| 3  | Sam   |
| 4  | Max   |

Table: Orders
| id | customerId |
| 1  | 3          |
| 2  | 1          |
